caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a grey professional microphone. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SH!T". He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin torso wearing a white shirt. Clothing racks and a black chair are visible in the background. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left is a circular emblem with "TOWN" text, and one on the right reads "BOSS REALLY TOT" in red. Across the sequence, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, moving from a focused look to a slight smile, while the rest of the scene remains static.
